tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersCreativesWatch
tools.description: Watches all creatives pertaining to a bidder. It is sufficient to invoke this endpoint once per bidder. A Pub/Sub topic will be created and notifications will be pushed to the topic when any of the bidder's creatives change status. All of the bidder's service accounts will have access to read from the topic. Subsequent invocations of this method will return the existing Pub/Sub configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersEndpointsList
tools.description: Lists all the bidder's endpoints.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersList
tools.description: Lists all the bidder accounts that belong to the caller.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsActivate
tools.description: Activates a pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsAddTargetedApps
tools.description: Adds targeted apps to the pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsAddTargetedPublishers
tools.description: Adds targeted publishers to the pretargeting config.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsAddTargetedSites
tools.description: Adds targeted sites to the pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a pretargeting configuration. A pretargeting configuration's state (PretargetingConfig.state) is active upon creation, and it will start to affect traffic shortly after. A bidder may create a maximum of 10 pretargeting configurations. Attempts to exceed this maximum results in a 400 bad request error.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsList
tools.description: Lists all pretargeting configurations for a single bidder.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsRemoveTargetedApps
tools.description: Removes targeted apps from the pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsRemoveTargetedPublishers
tools.description: Removes targeted publishers from the pretargeting config.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsRemoveTargetedSites
tools.description: Removes targeted sites from the pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPretargetingConfigsSuspend
tools.description: Suspends a pretargeting configuration.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPublisherConnectionsBatchApprove
tools.description: Batch approves multiple publisher connections.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPublisherConnectionsBatchReject
tools.description: Batch rejects multiple publisher connections.

tools.name: bidders.realtimebiddingBiddersPublisherConnectionsList
tools.description: Lists publisher connections for a given bidder.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersCreativesCreate
tools.description: Creates a creative.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersCreativesList
tools.description: Lists creatives as they are at the time of the initial request. This call may take multiple hours to complete. For large, paginated requests, this method returns a snapshot of creatives at the time of request for the first page. `lastStatusUpdate` and `creativeServingDecision` may be outdated for creatives on sequential pages. We recommend [Google Cloud Pub/Sub](//cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/overview) to view the latest status.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersCreativesPatch
tools.description: Updates a creative.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersList
tools.description: Lists all buyer account information the calling buyer user or service account is permissioned to manage.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsClose
tools.description: Change the status of a user list to CLOSED. This prevents new users from being added to the user list.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsCreate
tools.description: Create a new user list.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsGet
tools.description: Gets a user list by its name.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsGetRemarketingTag
tools.description: Gets remarketing tag for a buyer. A remarketing tag is a piece of JavaScript code that can be placed on a web page. When a user visits a page containing a remarketing tag, Google adds the user to a user list.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsList
tools.description: Lists the user lists visible to the current user.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsOpen
tools.description: Change the status of a user list to OPEN. This allows new users to be added to the user list.

tools.name: buyers.realtimebiddingBuyersUserListsUpdate
tools.description: Update the given user list. Only user lists with URLRestrictions can be updated.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
